name: Grilled Chicken with Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
2 tablespoons Chopped fresh cilantro OR 2 tablespoons Chopped fresh parsley plus sprigs to garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Light a medium-hot fire in a BBQ grill. Pound the chicken breasts slightly to flatten evenly. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Dice the red bell pepper.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the crushed pineapple with its juice, diced green onions, red bell pepper, and chopped cilantro. Season with salt and generously with pepper to taste. Let stand at room temperature while you cook the chicken.
3. On an oiled grill rack, grill the chicken a total of about 8 minutes, turning occasionally until the chicken is nicely browned on the outside and white but still moist in the center.
4. Serve the chicken topped with a generous spoonful of pineapple salsa. Garnish with the remaining green onion slices and sprigs of cilantro.
